summary: Tested all backend APIs and frontend flows for Mulya Salon POS Kasir improvements. All 7 backend pytest tests passed. Frontend Kasir page (stylist required, no tax, tunai-only cash/change fields, realtime change, receipt with invoice/customer/stylist/total/payment/dibayar/kembalian), Owner Dashboard widgets, and Reports Komisi Stylist tab all working correctly.

issues: Missing aria-describedby on DialogContent (a11y console warning, non-blocking)
Historical transactions without stylist appear as row with name '-' and Rp 0 commission. Consider filtering out null stylist_id rows OR seeding/cleaning legacy data.

action_items: (Optional) Filter null stylist_id rows in /api/reports/stylist-commission to hide legacy '-' entries.
(Optional) Add aria-describedby to receipt DialogContent to remove a11y warning.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: Invoice generation uses count_documents which can race under concurrency producing duplicate INV numbers. Consider an atomic counter via findOneAndUpdate on a counters collection.

server.py: Dashboard 'today' filter uses ISO string lexicographic comparison ($gte today_start) - works for UTC ISO strings but couples DB query format to storage format. Acceptable for current scale.
server.py file is ~600 lines; still manageable but approaching threshold to split into routers (auth, transactions, reports, etc.).
Frontend KasirPage.js: cashPaid stored as Number, but Input value=0 initial — UX could improve by clearing on focus.
test_credentials: owner@mulyasalon.com / owner123, kasir@mulyasalon.com / kasir123 (both verified working)
seed_data_creation: Created transactions during testing via real POS flow (INV-0006). Existing seeded customers/stylists/services used.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Kasir improvements verified end-to-end: stylist required (checkout disabled until selected), no Pajak field, cash/change visible only for Tunai, hidden for QRIS/Transfer/E-Wallet, kembalian computed realtime. Receipt shows invoice INV-XXXX, tanggal, pelanggan, stylist, items, total, payment method, dibayar, kembalian. Owner dashboard shows 3 extra widgets (Pendapatan Hari Ini, Komisi Stylist Hari Ini, Top Stylist Bulan Ini). Reports has 'Komisi Stylist' tab with columns: Nama Stylist, Jumlah Transaksi, Omzet, Total Komisi. Backend: invoice auto-generation works, commission = stylist.commission_rate% × services-only subtotal (verified products excluded). Transaction model has no 'tax', cash_paid & change_amount persist.
